Live Radio Karaoke

On-device live radio transcription with karaoke highlighting, summaries and translation. Personal F-Droid repo for the live-radio-karaoke-android app.

Currently it serves 1 apps. To add it to your F-Droid app, scan the QR code (click it to enlarge) or use this link:

https://vieenrose.github.io/live-radio-karaoke-android/repo

If you would like to manually verify the fingerprint (SHA-256) of the repository signing key, here it is:
C8 F6 46 13 96 96 71 7E E4 EC 80 00 0C C2 A9 7C 7D 05 33 05 D4 E5 1C F7 09 F5 24 7D AB A5 5C E4
